producer: QE 7.5 (conda-forge) pw.x+ph.x electron_phonon='simple' @ vast.ai GPU pod + BZ-sum reconstruction (star-weighted lambda + lambda-weighted log-avg omega) + hexa verify allen_dynes_tc
purpose: Parse the harvested SrAuH3 4x4x4-q electron-phonon DFT run; persist BZ-summed lambda, omega_log, Allen-Dynes Tc (mu*=0.10 and 0.13), dynamical stability, and the M7/M8 funnel evaluation.
system: SrAuH3 cubic Pm-3m perovskite-type, bravais index 1 (simple cubic), alat=7.234 bohr (3.828 Angstrom), 5 atoms/cell (1 Sr + 1 Au + 3 H), 24 valence electrons, unit-cell volume 378.56 (a.u.)^3

method.scf: ecutwfc=80 Ry, ecutrho=640 Ry, 84 k-points, Methfessel-Paxton smearing degauss=0.02 Ry; Fermi energy 12.107 eV
method.phonon: ph.x DFPT, 4x4x4 q-grid (10 irreducible q-points), star multiplicities [1,6,3,12,12,3,8,12,6,1] (sum=64)
method.elph: electron_phonon='simple', el_ph_sigma=0.005, el_ph_nsigma=10 (double-delta Gaussian widths 0.005-0.050 Ry)
method.moments: BZ-weighted lambda = sum_q w_q sum_nu lambda_q,nu / sum_q w_q; omega_log via lambda-weighted log-average of phonon freqs (lambda_q,nu taken verbatim from QE-printed lambda(nu), freqs from dyn files cm-1)
method.job_status: ph.out contains 'JOB DONE.' (1 match) — run completed

phonon_frequencies_cm-1.note: 150 mode entries across 10 q-points (15 modes each); Gamma-point acoustic ~10.5 cm-1, high-frequency H-derived modes up to ~1176 cm-1 (~146 meV)

stability.note: no negative/imaginary phonon frequencies in any dyn file across the full 4x4x4 q-grid — dynamically stable

results_by_broadening.note: small-broadening artifact (double-delta unconverged), NOT the converged value
plateau minimum — converged value used as headline

result.convergence_note: lambda is broadening-dependent; the 0.005 Ry value (1.49) is the standard double-delta artifact. The 0.020-0.035 Ry plateau bottoms at broad=0.030 Ry (lambda=0.615), the converged headline.

hexa_verify.verdict_mu010:
verify --expr allen_dynes_tc(0.615,591.18,0.1)=14.5511
  calc   = 14.5511  ≈ expected 14.5511  (|Δ|=7.10543e-15 ≤ ε=1e-9)
  tier   = 🟢 SUPPORTED-NUMERICAL  (hexa-native libm-class recompute, TECS-L n6-rep Tier2)
hexa_verify.verdict_mu013:
verify --expr allen_dynes_tc(0.615,591.18,0.13)=10.4069
  calc   = 10.4069  ≈ expected 10.4069  (|Δ|=5.32907e-15 ≤ ε=1e-9)
  tier   = 🟢 SUPPORTED-NUMERICAL  (hexa-native libm-class recompute, TECS-L n6-rep Tier2)

m8_evaluation.criterion: pressure < 50 GPa AND stable AND Tc > 200K (RTSC.md M8 / N5 ambient-stable funnel)
m8_evaluation.axis_pressure_lt_50GPa: N/A — this run carries no EOS/pressure record (fixed-cell elph only). Pressure axis CANNOT be evaluated from this run; flagged for a separate EOS run.
m8_evaluation.axis_stable: PASS — 0 imaginary modes, min freq +10.54 cm-1 across the full 4x4x4 q-grid
m8_evaluation.axis_Tc_gt_200K: FAIL — Tc(mu0.10)=14.55 K, Tc(mu0.13)=10.41 K, far below the 200K threshold
m8_evaluation.verdict: M8 NOT MET. 1 of 3 axes PASS (stability); Tc axis FAILs hard (~14 K << 200 K); pressure axis N/A (flag for EOS). SrAuH3 is dynamically stable but a weak-coupling (lambda~0.6) low-Tc conventional superconductor at this geometry — does not advance the ambient-stable RTSC funnel.

honest_caveats: lambda_BZ and omega_log were RECONSTRUCTED from the per-mode lambda(nu)/gamma and dyn-file frequencies with the standard star-weighted BZ sum (no lambda.x output was present in the tgz; QE electron_phonon='simple' prints only per-q per-mode lambda, not the BZ total). Method matches the prior rtsc_h3s elph-validation convention.

lambda is broadening-dependent: the 0.005 Ry value (1.49) is a double-delta artifact; the converged headline lambda=0.615 is read off the 0.020-0.035 Ry plateau minimum (broad=0.030 Ry), per the prior h3s convention.
DFT is Tier-1 PREDICTION, not Tier-3 measurement: gate_type=simulation-only-prediction, absorbed=false (R4 invariant).
Anharmonicity (significant for H-bearing systems) was not included; SSCHA-level treatment could shift both phonons and lambda.
Coarse 4x4x4 q-grid; denser k/q could shift lambda, but the qualitative weak-coupling result (lambda~0.6, Tc~14 K) is unambiguous.
r4_invariant: absorbed=false · gate_type=simulation-only-prediction · domain=material. DFT prediction record; does NOT claim RTSC absorbed=true (M8 not met — Tc~14 K << 200 K).
